violations.text: An allergen awareness statement is lacking on the menu boards or at the points of sale. Per the PIC, allergen statement is be printed and set for customer viewing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Chemical spray bottles were stored hanging from the edge of the counter at the hand sink. Chemicals must be stored in a way to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Chemical spray bottles were relocated for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The ceiling in the front food service area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles are to be replaced with smooth/wipeable, easily cleanable tiles. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026

At the time of inspection, Staff were observed to not sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. At the time of inspection, proper setup of the 3 bay sink was reviewed and a proper sanitizing solution was set up. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Thawed hot dogs were observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit in the mini fridge. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. (Hot dogs were voluntarily disposed of by the PIC at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Working spray containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles are to be marked with the name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in dry storage room (on the floor). Single service items are to be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The mini fridge located in the back area above the keg refrigerator was observed in need of adjustment/repair. The unit was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Use of the unit for cold holding of food items is to be discontinued until adjusted or serviced and maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. PIC to use colder refrigerator for cold holding of Time Temperature Control for Safety Foods. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The receptacle in the upstairs unisex toilet room is lacking a covered waste receptacle. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
